interactions.mechanism: Mwarobaini (neem) contains compounds that may inhibit platelet aggregation and affect vitamin K-dependent clotting factors. This can significantly increase the anticoagulant effect of warfarin, raising bleeding risk.
interactions.explanation: Mwarobaini (neem) may increase bleeding risk when taken with blood thinners. Mwarobaini inaweza kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa na damu ikiwa unatumia dawa za kuzuia kuganda kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Neem can affect liver function and blood clotting. Epuka kuchanganya. Mwarobaini inaweza kuathiri ini na kuganda kwa damu.

interactions.mechanism: Moringa leaves are rich in vitamin K, which directly counteracts the mechanism of warfarin. However, some compounds in moringa may also have antiplatelet effects, creating complex interactions that can unpredictably affect INR levels.
interactions.explanation: Moringa may increase the effects of warfarin, raising bleeding risk. Moringa inaweza kuongeza athari za warfarin, na kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa na damu.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Tell your doctor you take moringa. Epuka kuchanganya. Mwambie daktari wako kama unatumia moringa.

interactions.mechanism: Garlic contains allicin and other sulfur compounds that have antiplatelet effects. It may also affect the CYP450 enzyme system, potentially altering warfarin metabolism. The combination can increase bleeding risk.
interactions.explanation: Garlic may increase warfarin's effects and bleeding risk. Kitunguu saumu kinaweza kuongeza athari za warfarin na hatari ya kutokwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor for bruising/bleeding. Consult your doctor. Angalia michubuko au damu kutoka. Wasiliana na daktari wako.

interactions.mechanism: Khat (muguka/miraa) contains cathinone and cathine, which are metabolized by CYP450 liver enzymes (particularly CYP3A4). These same enzymes metabolize tenofovir and other ARVs. Competition for these enzymes can reduce ARV effectiveness and increase khat toxicity.
interactions.explanation: Muguka (khat) may affect liver enzymes and reduce HIV drug effectiveness. Muguka inaweza kuathiri ini na kupunguza ufanisi wa dawa za HIV.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid muguka while on HIV treatment. Can cause treatment failure. Epuka muguka ukitumia dawa za HIV. Inaweza kusababisha tiba kushindwa.

interactions.mechanism: Neem may affect liver enzyme activity (particularly CYP3A4 and CYP2C19), which could alter the metabolism of tenofovir and other ARVs. It may also have hepatotoxic effects when used in high doses or long-term.
interactions.explanation: Mwarobaini may affect liver function and could interact with HIV medications. Mwarobaini inaweza kuathiri ini na kuingiliana na dawa za HIV.
interactions.recommendation: Consult your doctor before using. Monitor liver function. Wasiliana na daktari kabla ya kutumia. Angalia afya ya ini.

interactions.mechanism: Both efavirenz and khat affect the CNS. Khat is a stimulant while efavirenz can cause CNS side effects. The combination may worsen efavirenz neuropsychiatric effects including dizziness, insomnia, and vivid dreams. Competition for CYP2B6 and CYP3A4 enzymes may also alter drug levels.
interactions.explanation: Khat may worsen CNS side effects of efavirenz (dizziness, confusion, nightmares). Muguka inaweza kuongeza athari za efavirenz kama kizunguzungu, kuchanganyikiwa, na ndoto mbaya.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Can cause severe neurological symptoms. Epuka kuchanganya. Inaweza kusababisha dalili hatari za mfumo wa fahamu.

interactions.mechanism: Bitter melon contains charantin, polypeptide-p, and vicine, all of which have blood glucose-lowering effects. When combined with metformin, there is an increased risk of hypoglycemia due to additive effects on glucose metabolism.
interactions.explanation: Both lower blood sugar. Combined effect may cause hypoglycemia. Zote hupunguza sukari kwa damu. Pamoja zinaweza kupunguza sukari kupita kiasi.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood sugar closely. Watch for dizziness/shaking. Pima sukari mara kwa mara. Angalia kizunguzungu au kutetemeka.

interactions.mechanism: Moringa leaves contain isothiocyanates that have demonstrated hypoglycemic effects. Studies show moringa can reduce blood glucose levels, potentially adding to metformin's effects and increasing hypoglycemia risk.
interactions.explanation: Moringa may lower blood sugar and could add to metformin's effects. Moringa inaweza kupunguza sukari kwa damu na kuongeza athari za metformin.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood glucose closely if using both. Pima sukari mara kwa mara ukitumia zote mbili.

interactions.mechanism: Garlic has been shown to have blood pressure-lowering effects through multiple mechanisms including vasodilation and ACE inhibition. When combined with lisinopril (an ACE inhibitor), there may be additive hypotensive effects, increasing risk of dizziness and hypotension.
interactions.explanation: Both can lower blood pressure. Combined effect may cause dizziness. Zote zinaweza kupunguza shinikizo la damu. Pamoja zinaweza kusababisha kizunguzungu.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood pressure. Rise slowly from sitting/lying. Pima shinikizo la damu. Inuka polepole uketi au ulale chini.

interactions.mechanism: Hibiscus tea contains anthocyanins and other compounds that inhibit ACE similarly to lisinopril. Studies demonstrate significant hypotensive effects, and concurrent use may lead to excessive blood pressure reduction.
interactions.explanation: Hibiscus tea can lower blood pressure and may enhance drug effects. Chai ya hibiscus inaweza kupunguza shinikizo la damu na kuongeza athari za dawa.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood pressure if drinking hibiscus tea regularly. Pima shinikizo la damu ukinywa chai ya hibiscus mara kwa mara.

interactions.mechanism: Khat is a sympathomimetic stimulant that increases heart rate and blood pressure through cathinone-induced norepinephrine release. This directly opposes the therapeutic effects of nifedipine and other antihypertensives, potentially causing dangerous blood pressure fluctuations and increased cardiovascular risk.
interactions.explanation: Khat can increase heart rate and blood pressure, opposing effects of blood pressure meds. Muguka inaweza kuongeza mapigo ya moyo na shinikizo la damu, kupinga athari za dawa za shinikizo.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid khat. Can cause dangerous blood pressure fluctuations. Epuka muguka. Inaweza kusababisha mabadiliko hatari ya shinikizo la damu.

interactions.mechanism: Both khat and SSRIs like sertraline increase serotonin levels in the CNS through different mechanisms. Concurrent use significantly increases risk of serotonin syndrome, a potentially life-threatening condition characterized by agitation, hyperthermia, and autonomic instability.
interactions.explanation: Khat and antidepressants can cause dangerous interactions including serotonin syndrome. Muguka na dawa za mfadhaiko zinaweza kusababisha mwingiliano hatari ikiwemo serotonin syndrome.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid khat completely while on antidepressants. Epuka muguka kabisa ukitumia dawa za mfadhaiko.

interactions.mechanism: Neem contains compounds that may affect cardiac contractility and electrolyte balance. There are case reports of neem-induced bradycardia and hypotension. When combined with digoxin, there is risk of additive cardiac effects and potential toxicity.
interactions.explanation: Neem may affect heart function and interact with digoxin. Mwarobaini inaweza kuathiri moyo na kuingiliana na digoxin.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Epuka kuchanganya.

interactions.mechanism: Both paracetamol and neem are metabolized in the liver and can cause hepatotoxicity in high doses or with prolonged use. Neem may also affect glutathione levels, which are crucial for paracetamol detoxification, potentially increasing liver injury risk.
interactions.explanation: Both can affect the liver. Combined use may increase liver stress. Zote zinaweza kuathiri ini. Kuchanganya kunaweza kuongeza msongo kwa ini.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid long-term use together. Don't exceed paracetamol dose. Epuka kutumia kwa muda mrefu pamoja. Usizidi kipimo cha paracetamol.

interactions.mechanism: Khat (muguka/miraa) contains cathinone, a Schedule I substance similar to amphetamines. It affects CYP450 liver enzymes (particularly CYP3A4, CYP2D6), which metabolize over 50% of all medications. This can lead to altered drug levels, reduced efficacy, or increased toxicity of many pharmaceuticals including ARVs, antidepressants, antipsychotics, and cardiovascular drugs.
interactions.explanation: Muguka (khat) interacts with MANY medications. Affects liver enzymes, heart rate, and blood pressure. Muguka inaingiliana na dawa NYINGI. Inaathiri ini, mapigo ya moyo, na shinikizo la damu.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID muguka completely if taking ANY medication. EPUKA muguka kabisa ukitumia dawa YOYOTE.

interactions.mechanism: Mwarobaini (neem) affects multiple CYP450 enzyme systems including CYP3A4, CYP2C19, and CYP2D6. It can also cause hepatotoxicity and affects blood glucose, blood pressure, and coagulation. These effects create potential interactions with numerous medications across different therapeutic classes.
interactions.explanation: Mwarobaini (neem) affects liver enzymes and may interact with many medications. Mwarobaini inaathiri ini na inaweza kuingiliana na dawa nyingi.
interactions.recommendation: Always inform your doctor if you use mwarobaini regularly. Daima mwambie daktari wako kama unatumia mwarobaini mara kwa mara.

interactions.mechanism: St. John's Wort is a potent inducer of CYP3A4 and P-glycoprotein, which significantly increases the metabolism of many drugs. This can reduce drug levels by 50% or more, leading to treatment failure for critical medications including ARVs, immunosuppressants, oral contraceptives, and cardiovascular drugs.
interactions.explanation: St. John's Wort affects liver enzymes and interacts with 50% of all drugs. St. John's Wort inaathiri ini na inaingiliana na 50% ya dawa zote.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid this herb with ANY medication unless approved by your doctor. Epuka mmea huu na dawa YOYOTE isipokuwa umeidhinishwa na daktari wako.

interactions.mechanism: Moringa affects multiple physiological systems. It has hypoglycemic, hypotensive, and anticoagulant effects. It may also affect CYP450 enzymes and P-glycoprotein transport. These properties create potential interactions with diabetes medications, antihypertensives, anticoagulants, and drugs metabolized by the liver.
interactions.explanation: Moringa may affect blood thinners, diabetes medications, and blood pressure drugs. Moringa inaweza kuathiri dawa za kuzuia kuganda damu, dawa za kisukari, na dawa za shinikizo.
interactions.recommendation: Consult your doctor if on heart, diabetes, or blood-thinning medication. Wasiliana na daktari wako ukitumia dawa za moyo, kisukari, au kuzuia kuganda damu.

interactions.mechanism: Garlic has antiplatelet, anticoagulant, hypotensive, and hypoglycemic effects. It may also affect CYP2E1 and CYP3A4 enzyme activity. These properties create potential interactions with anticoagulants, antiplatelet drugs, antihypertensives, diabetes medications, and certain HIV medications.
interactions.explanation: Garlic may increase bleeding, lower blood pressure, and affect blood sugar. Kitunguu saumu kinaweza kuongeza damu kutoka, kupunguza shinikizo la damu, na kuathiri sukari.
interactions.recommendation: Consult your doctor if on blood thinners, blood pressure meds, or diabetes meds. Wasiliana na daktari wako ukitumia dawa za kuzuia kuganda damu, shinikizo, au kisukari.

interactions.mechanism: Ginger has mild antiplatelet and anticoagulant effects through inhibition of thromboxane synthetase. In culinary amounts, these effects are minimal, but high-dose supplements may increase bleeding risk, particularly when combined with anticoagulants or antiplatelet drugs.
interactions.explanation: Ginger in small amounts is safe. Large amounts may increase bleeding. Tangawizi kwa kiasi kidogo ni salama. Kiasi kikubwa kinaweza kuongeza damu kutoka.
interactions.recommendation: Safe for normal culinary use. Avoid high-dose supplements with blood thinners. Salama kwa matumizi ya kawaida ya kupikia. Epuka dozi kubwa ukitumia dawa za kuzuia kuganda damu.

interactions.mechanism: Dolutegravir is metabolized primarily by UGT1A1 with some involvement of CYP3A4. Khat affects multiple enzyme systems and may alter dolutegravir levels. The stimulant effects of khat may also mask or worsen dolutegravir side effects.
interactions.explanation: May affect HIV drug levels. Limited data available. Inaweza kuathiri kiwango cha dawa za HIV. Taarifa chache.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid muguka while on HIV treatment to be safe. Epuka muguka ukitumia dawa za HIV kuwa salama.

interactions.mechanism: Mukombero is traditionally used for diabetes management. While limited scientific data exists, it may have hypoglycemic effects that could add to metformin's action, increasing hypoglycemia risk.
interactions.explanation: Mukombero may affect blood sugar levels. Mukombero inaweza kuathiri kiwango cha sukari kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood glucose closely if using this combination. Pima sukari mara kwa mara ukitumia mchanganyiko huu.

interactions.mechanism: Muraatina (East African greenheart) contains compounds that may affect liver enzyme activity. Traditionally used for multiple purposes, it may interact with medications metabolized by the liver. Limited scientific data available.
interactions.explanation: Limited data. May affect liver function and drug metabolism. Taarifa chache. Inaweza kuathiri ini na usindikaji wa dawa mwilini.
interactions.recommendation: Consult doctor before using with any medication. Wasiliana na daktari kabla ya kutumia na dawa yoyote.

interactions.mechanism: Mukinduri is used traditionally for various ailments. Seeds contain compounds that may affect liver and kidney function. Limited safety data exists for concurrent use with medications.
interactions.explanation: Limited safety data. May affect liver and kidney function. Taarifa chache za usalama. Inaweza kuathiri ini na figo.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid with medications that affect liver or kidneys. Epuka na dawa zinazoathiri ini au figo.

interactions.mechanism: Aloe latex contains anthraquinones that have laxative effects and can cause electrolyte imbalances, particularly potassium depletion. This can potentiate cardiac glycosides (digoxin) and antiarrhythmic drugs. Aloe gel is generally safe, but the latex component can also affect blood glucose levels.
interactions.explanation: Aloe latex can affect drug absorption and cause electrolyte imbalances. Sehemu ya ndani ya aloe inaweza kuathiri nfyonzaji wa dawa na kusababisha usawa wa madini mwilini.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid aloe latex products. Aloe gel is safe. Epuka kumeza sehemu ya ndani ya aloe. Gel ya nje ni salama.

interactions.mechanism: Used primarily for benign prostatic hyperplasia. Contains phytosterols that may affect hormone metabolism. Limited drug interaction data, but theoretical interactions with hormone therapies and anticoagulants exist.
interactions.explanation: Limited interaction data. Used for prostate health. Taarifa chache za mwingiliano. Hutumika kwa afya ya tezi dume.
interactions.recommendation: Generally safe but inform your healthcare provider. Kwa kawaida ni salama lakini mwambie daktari wako.

interactions.mechanism: No known direct interaction, but both are metabolized in the liver. Prunus africana may have mild effects on hormone pathways but unlikely to significantly alter tenofovir levels.
interactions.explanation: No known interaction with this herb. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana na mmea huu.
interactions.recommendation: Safe but inform your doctor. Salama lakini mwambie daktari wako.

interactions.mechanism: Both simvastatin and neem can affect liver function. Neem may inhibit CYP3A4, the enzyme that metabolizes simvastatin, potentially increasing statin levels and risk of myopathy and hepatotoxicity.
interactions.explanation: Neem may affect liver function and could increase statin side effects. Mwarobaini inaweza kuathiri ini na kuongeza athari za dawa za kolesteroli.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor for muscle pain. Check liver function. Angalia maumivu ya misuli. Pima afya ya ini.

interactions.mechanism: Both ibuprofen and ginger can affect the stomach lining and have antiplatelet effects. Concurrent use increases risk of gastrointestinal bleeding and may impair renal function in susceptible individuals.
interactions.explanation: Both can affect stomach lining and increase bleeding risk. Zote zinaweza kuathiri utando wa tumbo na kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Take with food. Watch for stomach pain or dark stools. Kula na chakula. Angalia maumivu ya tumbo au kinyesi cheusi.

interactions.explanation: Neem may increase bleeding risk by inhibiting liver enzymes and reducing platelet aggregation. Mwarobaini inaweza kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu kwa kuzuia vimeng'enya vya ini na kupunguza kuganda kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Monitor INR closely if used. Epuka kuchanganya. Pima INR mara kwa mara ukitumia.

interactions.explanation: Khat stimulates cardiovascular system and may alter warfarin metabolism, leading to unpredictable INR. Muguka huchochea mfumo wa moyo na inaweza kubadilisha kiwango cha warfarin, na kusababisha INR isiyotabirika.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID completely while on warfarin. EPUKA kabisa ukitumia warfarin.
interactions.notes: Risk of treatment failure or toxicity

interactions.explanation: Moringa leaves are rich in vitamin K, which directly counteracts warfarin's anticoagulant effect. Majani ya moringa yana vitamin K nyingi, inayopinga moja kwa moja athari ya warfarin.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination or monitor INR very frequently. Epuka kuchanganya au pima INR mara kwa mara sana.

interactions.explanation: Garlic may increase bleeding risk through inhibition of platelet aggregation. Kitunguu saumu kinaweza kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu kwa kuzuia kuganda kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor for bruising/bleeding. Avoid high doses. Angalia michubuko au damu kutoka. Epuka dozi kubwa.

interactions.explanation: Large amounts of ginger may enhance the anticoagulant effect. Tangawizi kwa wingi inaweza kuongeza athari ya warfarin.
interactions.recommendation: Culinary amounts safe; avoid high-dose supplements. Kiasi cha kupikia ni salama; epuka virutubisho vya dozi kubwa.

interactions.explanation: Curcumin in turmeric has antiplatelet properties and may increase bleeding risk. Manjano ina curcumin inayozuia kuganda kwa damu na inaweza kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid high doses; culinary amounts safe. Epuka dozi kubwa; kiasi cha kupikia ni salama.

interactions.explanation: No direct anticoagulant effect reported, but may affect INR indirectly through other mechanisms. Hakuna athari ya moja kwa moja inayojulikana, lakini inaweza kuathiri INR kwa njia nyingine.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR if used regularly. Pima INR ukitumia mara kwa mara.

interactions.explanation: Minimal effect on coagulation. Athari ndogo kwenye kuganda kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in normal amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kawaida.

interactions.explanation: Aloe latex can cause potassium loss, which may affect heart rhythm and potentiate anticoagulants. Sehemu ya ndani ya aloe inaweza kupunguza potasiamu, na kuathiri mdundo wa moyo na kuongeza athari za warfarin.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid aloe latex products; aloe gel is safe. Epuka kumeza sehemu ya ndani ya aloe; gel ya nje ni salama.

interactions.explanation: Hibiscus may have mild anticoagulant properties and can increase INR. Hibiscus inaweza kuwa na athari ndogo ya kuzuia kuganda damu na kuongeza INR.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR if drinking hibiscus tea regularly. Pima INR ukinywa chai ya hibiscus mara kwa mara.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction with warfarin. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Generally safe, but monitor INR. Kwa kawaida ni salama, lakini pima INR.

interactions.explanation: St. John's Wort induces liver enzymes, reducing warfarin levels and increasing risk of clot formation. St. John's Wort huchochea vimeng'enya vya ini, na kupunguza kiwango cha warfarin na kuongeza hatari ya kuganda kwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID completely. EPUKA kabisa.

interactions.explanation: Limited evidence of interaction; generally considered safe. Ushahidi mdogo wa mwingiliano; kwa kawaida inachukuliwa kuwa salama.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR as precaution. Pima INR kwa tahadhari.

interactions.explanation: Hawthorn may have antiplatelet effects and could increase bleeding risk. Hawthorn inaweza kuwa na athari ya kuzuia kuganda damu na kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Use with caution; monitor INR. Tumia kwa tahadhari; pima INR.

interactions.explanation: Licorice can cause hypokalemia and hypertension, which may indirectly affect INR. Licorice inaweza kupunguza potasiamu na kuongeza shinikizo, na kuathiri INR kwa njia isiyo ya moja kwa moja.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid large amounts; monitor potassium and INR. Epuka kiasi kikubwa; pima potasiamu na INR.

interactions.explanation: No significant interaction reported. Hakuna mwingiliano mkubwa unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in normal amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kawaida.

interactions.explanation: Red yeast rice contains monacolin K (similar to lovastatin), which may have mild anticoagulant effects and increase INR. Red yeast rice ina monacolin K (sawa na lovastatin), inayoweza kuwa na athari ndogo ya kuzuia kuganda damu na kuongeza INR.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR; avoid high doses. Pima INR; epuka dozi kubwa.

interactions.explanation: Thymoquinone in black seed may inhibit platelet aggregation and increase bleeding risk. Thymoquinone katika black seed inaweza kuzuia kuganda kwa damu na kuongeza hatari ya kutokwa damu.
interactions.recommendation: Use with caution; monitor INR. Tumia kwa tahadhari; pima INR.

interactions.explanation: Minimal effect on coagulation; may affect blood sugar but not INR directly. Athari ndogo kwenye kuganda damu; inaweza kuathiri sukari lakini si INR moja kwa moja.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in normal amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kawaida.

interactions.explanation: Ginkgo biloba inhibits platelet-activating factor, significantly increasing bleeding risk with warfarin. Ginkgo biloba inazuia sababu ya kuganda kwa damu, na kuongeza sana hatari ya kutokwa damu pamoja na warfarin.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID combination. EPUKA kuchanganya.

interactions.explanation: Both tenofovir and neem can affect kidney and liver function; combined use may increase risk of organ toxicity. Tenofovir na mwarobaini vinaweza kuathiri figo na ini; kuchanganya kunaweza kuongeza hatari ya sumu kwa viungo hivi.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor renal and liver function regularly. Avoid long-term combination. Pima kazi ya figo na ini mara kwa mara. Epuka kuchanganya kwa muda mrefu.
interactions.notes: Use with caution in patients with baseline renal impairment

interactions.explanation: Khat may cause renal damage and also affect adherence to ARV therapy due to its stimulant effects and potential for addiction. Muguka inaweza kuharibu figo na pia kuathiri ufuasi wa tiba ya ARV kwa sababu ya athari zake za kuchochea na uwezekano wa uraibu.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID khat completely while on tenofovir. EPUKA muguka kabisa ukitumia tenofovir.
interactions.notes: Risk of treatment failure and kidney damage

interactions.explanation: No known significant interaction. Moringa may have nephroprotective effects in some studies, but no direct interaction with tenofovir reported. Hakuna mwingiliano mkubwa unaojulikana. Moringa inaweza kuwa na athari za kulinda figo katika tafiti zingine, lakini hakuna mwingiliano wa moja kwa moja na tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Safe, but inform your doctor. Salama, lakini mwambie daktari wako.

interactions.explanation: Garlic does not significantly affect tenofovir pharmacokinetics. Kitunguu saumu hakiathiri kiwango cha tenofovir kwa kiasi kikubwa.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in culinary amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kupikia.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No significant interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano mkubwa.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in normal amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kawaida.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction with tenofovir. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana na tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Limited data; traditional use may involve kidney effects. Caution advised. Taarifa chache; matumizi ya kienyeji yanaweza kuhusisha athari kwa figo. Tahadhari inashauriwa.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid concurrent use or monitor renal function. Epuka kutumia pamoja au pima kazi ya figo.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Aloe latex can cause kidney damage when taken orally; concurrent use with tenofovir may increase nephrotoxicity risk. Sehemu ya ndani ya aloe inaweza kuharibu figo ikimezwa; kutumia pamoja na tenofovir kunaweza kuongeza hatari ya sumu kwa figo.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid aloe latex products; aloe gel is safe. Epuka kumeza sehemu ya ndani ya aloe; gel ya nje ni salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction with tenofovir. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana na tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Safe in normal amounts. Salama kwa kiasi cha kawaida.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe but monitor if used long-term. Salama lakini pima kama unatumia kwa muda mrefu.

interactions.explanation: St. John's Wort may induce transporters (P-gp) involved in tenofovir disposition, potentially reducing its efficacy. St. John's Wort inaweza kuchochea usafirishaji wa tenofovir, na kupunguza ufanisi wake.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination; monitor viral load if used. Epuka kuchanganya; pima kiwango cha virusi ukitumia.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Licorice can cause hypokalemia and hypertension, which may stress kidneys and worsen tenofovir renal toxicity. Licorice inaweza kupunguza potasiamu na kuongeza shinikizo, na kuleta msongo kwa figo na kuzidisha sumu ya tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid large amounts; monitor potassium and renal function. Epuka kiasi kikubwa; pima potasiamu na kazi ya figo.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction with tenofovir. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana na tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No significant interaction reported. Ginkgo may have antiplatelet effects but does not affect tenofovir. Hakuna mwingiliano mkubwa unaojulikana. Ginkgo inaweza kuwa na athari ya kuzuia kuganda damu lakini haiathiri tenofovir.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Neem may lower blood glucose and also affect liver function; combined use with metformin could increase hypoglycemia risk and liver stress. Mwarobaini inaweza kupunguza sukari kwa damu na pia kuathiri ini; kuchanganya na metformin kunaweza kuongeza hatari ya sukari kupungua na msongo kwa ini.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood glucose and liver function. Avoid long-term high doses. Pima sukari kwa damu na kazi ya ini. Epuka dozi kubwa kwa muda mrefu.
interactions.notes: Use with caution, especially in patients with liver issues

interactions.recommendation: Report signs of infection, hyperglycemia, or adrenal insufficiency. Ripoti dalili za maambukizi, sukari kuongezeka, au upungufu wa adrenal.

interactions.recommendation: AVOID khat while using salbutamol, especially in asthma/COPD. EPUKA muguka ukitumia salbutamol, hasa kwa pumu/COPD.

interactions.explanation: Critical: Valproate has a narrow therapeutic index (50–100 mg/L). Hepatotoxicity is a major concern; monitor LFTs regularly, especially in first 6 months. CNS depression may be additive with sedative herbs. Muhimu sana: Valproate ina upepo mdogo wa matibabu (50–100 mg/L). Uharibifu wa ini ni wasiwasi mkubwa; pima kazi ya ini mara kwa mara, hasa katika miezi 6 ya kwanza. Usingizi unaweza kuongezeka kwa mimea inayotuliza.
interactions.recommendation: Never adjust dose without consulting doctor. Report symptoms: jaundice, lethargy, vomiting, bleeding. Usibadilishe kipimo bila kushauriana na daktari. Ripoti dalili: homa ya manjano, uchovu, kutapika, kutokwa damu.

interactions.explanation: Neem may inhibit CYP2D6 and CYP3A4, potentially reducing formation of active M1 metabolite and altering tramadol levels, leading to unpredictable analgesia and side effects. Mwarobaini inaweza kuzuia CYP2D6 na CYP3A4, ikiweza kupunguza uundaji wa metabolite hai M1 na kubadilisha kiwango cha tramadol, na kusababisha kutotabirika kwa ufanisi na athari.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor pain control; use with caution. Angalia udhibiti wa maumivu; tumia kwa tahadhari.

interactions.explanation: Khat has stimulant effects, may increase serotonin, and may lower seizure threshold. Tramadol also increases serotonin and lowers seizure threshold. Combined use significantly increases risk of serotonin syndrome and seizures. Muguka ina athari za kuchochea, inaweza kuongeza serotonini, na inaweza kupunguza kiwango cha mshtuko. Tramadol pia huongeza serotonini na kupunguza kiwango cha mshtuko. Kuchanganya kunaongeza kwa kiasi kikubwa hatari ya ugonjwa wa serotonini na mshtuko.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID khat completely while on tramadol. EPUKA muguka kabisa ukitumia tramadol.
interactions.mechanism: CYP2D6 induction? + serotonin increase + seizure threshold ↓

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Moringa does not significantly affect CYP enzymes or serotonin. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana. Moringa haiathiri kwa kiasi kikubwa vimeng'enya vya CYP au serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Garlic may have mild antiplatelet effects but does not affect tramadol metabolism or serotonin. Kitunguu saumu kinaweza kuwa na athari ndogo ya kuzuia kuganda damu lakini hakiathiri usindikaji wa tramadol au serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Curcumin may inhibit CYP2D6 and CYP3A4, potentially reducing formation of active M1 metabolite and altering tramadol efficacy. Manjano inaweza kuzuia CYP2D6 na CYP3A4, ikiweza kupunguza uundaji wa metabolite hai M1 na kubadilisha ufanisi wa tramadol.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid high-dose turmeric supplements; monitor pain control. Epuka virutubisho vya dozi kubwa za manjano; angalia udhibiti wa maumivu.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Limited data; may have CNS-active compounds. Theoretical risk of additive sedation or serotonin effects. Taarifa chache; inaweza kuwa na vitu vinavyoathiri CNS. Hatari ya kinadharia ya kuongeza usingizi au athari za serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid concurrent use; monitor for excessive sedation or serotonin symptoms. Epuka kutumia pamoja; angalia usingizi kupita kiasi au dalili za serotonini.

interactions.explanation: No known effect on tramadol metabolism. Hakuna athari inayojulikana kwa usindikaji wa tramadol.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Aloe gel safe; aloe latex may cause diarrhea, potentially worsening tramadol-induced constipation or causing dehydration. Gel ya aloe ni salama; sehemu ya ndani inaweza kusababisha kuhara, ikiweza kuzidisha kuvimbiwa kutokana na tramadol au kusababisha upungufu wa maji.
interactions.recommendation: Aloe gel safe; avoid aloe latex. Gel ya aloe ni salama; epuka kumeza sephmu ya ndani.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: No known interaction. Hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: St. John's Wort induces CYP2D6 and CYP3A4, potentially reducing tramadol levels and active M1 metabolite, decreasing analgesia. It also has serotonergic activity, increasing serotonin syndrome risk. St. John's Wort huchochea CYP2D6 na CYP3A4, ikiweza kupunguza kiwango cha tramadol na metabolite hai M1, na kupunguza ufanisi. Pia ina shughuli ya serotonini, na kuongeza hatari ya ugonjwa wa serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: AVOID completely. EPUKA kabisa.

interactions.explanation: Echinacea may have weak CYP effects but unlikely to significantly alter tramadol metabolism. Echinacea inaweza kuwa na athari ndogo kwa CYP lakini haiwezekani kubadilisha kwa kiasi kikubwa usindikaji wa tramadol.
interactions.recommendation: Safe; monitor as usual. Salama; pima kwa kawaida.

interactions.explanation: Hawthorn may have cardiovascular effects but no known interaction. Hawthorn inaweza kuwa na athari kwa moyo lakini hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Licorice may weakly inhibit CYP3A4, potentially slightly increasing tramadol levels. Hypokalemia could theoretically affect cardiac stability with tramadol (rare QT prolongation). Licorice inaweza kuzuia CYP3A4 kwa nguvu ndogo, ikiweza kuongeza kidogo kiwango cha tramadol. Upungufu wa potasiamu unaweza kuathiri uthabiti wa moyo na tramadol (QT kuongezeka ni nadra).
interactions.recommendation: Use in moderation; monitor potassium if high doses. Tumia kwa kiasi; pima potasiamu ukitumia dozi kubwa.

interactions.explanation: Dandelion is a mild diuretic; no known interaction. Dandelion ni diuretiki kidogo; hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Red yeast rice lowers cholesterol; no known interaction. Red yeast rice hupunguza kolesteroli; hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Thymoquinone may inhibit CYP2D6, potentially reducing formation of active M1 metabolite and decreasing tramadol efficacy. Black seed may also have CNS effects. Thymoquinone inaweza kuzuia CYP2D6, ikiweza kupunguza uundaji wa metabolite hai M1 na kupunguza ufanisi wa tramadol. Black seed inaweza pia kuwa na athari kwa CNS.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor pain control; use with caution. Angalia udhibiti wa maumivu; tumia kwa tahadhari.

interactions.explanation: Fenugreek may affect glucose but no known interaction with tramadol. Fenugreek inaweza kuathiri sukari lakini hakuna mwingiliano unaojulikana na tramadol.
interactions.recommendation: Safe. Salama.

interactions.explanation: Ginkgo may inhibit CYP2D6, reducing formation of active M1 metabolite and decreasing analgesia. It also has serotonergic effects, raising serotonin syndrome risk. Ginkgo inaweza kuzuia CYP2D6, na kupunguza uundaji wa metabolite hai M1 na kupunguza ufanisi. Pia ina athari za serotonini, na kuongeza hatari ya ugonjwa wa serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination; use with extreme caution if necessary. Epuka kuchanganya; tumia kwa tahadhari kubwa ikiwa lazima.

interactions.explanation: Critical: Tramadol carries risks of serotonin syndrome, seizures, and opioid-related side effects. Avoid alcohol, other CNS depressants, and serotonergic drugs/herbs. Muhimu sana: Tramadol hubeba hatari za ugonjwa wa serotonini, mshtuko, na athari za opioid. Epuka pombe, vitu vingine vinavyolegeza CNS, na dawa/mimea yenye serotonini.
interactions.recommendation: Do not exceed prescribed dose. Seek immediate help if symptoms: agitation, confusion, rapid heart rate, fever, muscle rigidity. Usizidi kipimo kilichoagizwa. Tafuta msaada haraka ikiwa dalili: msukumo, kuchanganyikiwa, mapigo ya moyo ya haraka, homa, mgandamano wa misuli.
